channel.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence Daily
channel.description: Daily financial intelligence snapshot — markets, crypto, macro, construction, housing, jobs, and portfolio

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Saturday, April 25, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISK Daily · as of Apr 25
Regime: Neutral · Fear/Greed: 39 (Fear)
💡 Weekend session — limited market data. Weekday carryover (Apr 24): S&P futures +0.4%, DXY 98.61, 10Y 4.3%, VIX 20.0
Oil: $94.46 · Gold: $4,700 · Put/Call: 1.25 · HY Spreads: Tight
DXY Trend: Down · Sector Leader: XLE · Laggard: XLK
⚠️ Alerts (Apr 24): PLTR, AMD, NEM, IBRX
₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETS Daily | Weekly deep-dive updates Mondays · as of Apr 25
BTC: $77,462 (-0.6% 24h) · EOD (Apr 24): $78,126 · Structure: Bullish
Dominance: 60.6% · Fear/Greed: 39 (Fear)
⚠️ Testing $78,500 resistance — failed $80K breakout attempt Wed
Weekly (Apr 20): BTC/IGV Corr: 0.7 · On-chain: Accumulation · Stablecoin Mkt Cap: $313B
💡 Exchange reserves at 9-year low (~2.21M BTC). LTH controls ~78.3% of supply. Whales absorbed 270K BTC in past 30 days — largest monthly haul since 2013.
🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATE Local: when new data | National: Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 1
Local (Hollister/San Benito): Median $748,584 · Listings: 154 · DOM: 83 · Months Supply: 1.52
CA Statewide: Median $850,680
National: Existing Sales 4.09M · New Sales 587K · Starts 1487K
NAR Median: $398,000 · Case-Shiller YoY: 1.2%
30Y Rate: 6.38% · NAHB HMI: 38
⚠️ NAHB HMI at 38 — builder sentiment deeply pessimistic. Price cuts at 47% of local listings.
💼 JOBS & LABOR Monthly (1st) | Claims: weekly when flagged · as of Apr 1
🔥 NFP: -92K (prior revision: -17K) — headline contraction
U-3: 4.4% · LFPR: 62.0% · JOLTS: 6.9M openings
Initial Claims (4wk avg): 210K · Construction Payrolls: +30K
CA Unemployment: 5.1%
⚠️ NFP negative for first time — labor market softening. LFPR dropped to 62.0%, lowest in months.
🏗️ CONSTRUCTION & REMODELING Weekly (Fridays) · as of Apr 24
Lumber$583.50/MBF
Copper$6.02/lb
Steel HRC$1,055/ton
RMI: 62 · ABI: 49.8 · Backlog: 8.6 months
Permits: 1,518K · Spending: $2,190.4B
🔥 Cost Environment: Inflating — copper at $6.02/lb (multi-year high), steel surged to $1,055/ton
⚠️ ABI at 49.8 — below 50 signals contraction in commercial pipeline 9-12 months out.
📊 MACRO REGIME & SCORECARD Weekly (Mondays) · as of Apr 20
Yield Curve (2s10s)+0.55%✅ Supportive
Credit SpreadsTight✅ Supportive
ISM PMI52.7✅ Supportive
Fed Path~1 cut pricedNeutral
DXY98.61 (Down)✅ Supportive
Regime Score: Risk-On
Sector Rotation: Leading: XLE, XLB, XLF / Lagging: XLC, XLV, XLK
💡 Macro backdrop constructively aligning — ISM expansion, positive yield curve, tightening credit spreads, weakening dollar.
💰 PORTFOLIO & EARNINGS Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 1
S&P EPS Beat Rate: 75% · Blended EPS Growth: 13.0%
⚠️ Portfolio Notes: IBRX crashed 26pct on FDA Anktiva warning; XRPC down 41pct on XRP price collapse; APP and AVGO both pulled back 15pct+ from highs
🔥 Key Risk: TSMC capacity constraints threatening AI chip supply; IBRX regulatory/litigation risk unresolved; crypto altcoin exposure (XRPC) deteriorating
📊 Financial Intelligence Daily Snapshot
Dashboard: Open Interactive Dashboard
Generated April 25, 2026 by Claude Cowork · Nightly Consolidator

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Sunday, April 19, 2026
item.description:

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Monday, April 20, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISKDaily · as of Apr 19

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Tuesday, April 21, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISKDaily · as of Apr 21
✅ Regime: Risk-On — Fear & Greed at 70 (Greed)
S&P Futures: +0.17% · DXY: 98.31 (trend: Down) · 10Y: 4.25% · 2s10s: +0.55%
VIX: 17.48 · Put/Call: 0.91 · WTI Oil: $86.18 · Gold: $4,800
HY Spreads: Tight · Sectors: XLE leading / XLK lagging
🔥 BTC EOD: $75,658 (+1.5%) · Structure: Bullish
💡 Testing $75,272 (100-day EMA) and $75,680 horizontal resistance cluster — first sustained push above $75K
⚠️ Alerts: TSLA, BTC
₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETSDaily | Weekly deep-dive Mondays · as of Apr 21
🔥 BTC: $75,658 · 24h: +1.5% · Dominance: 57.0% · Structure: Bullish
Fear & Greed: 70 (Greed)
💡 Weekly (Apr 20): BTC/IGV Correlation: 0.70 · On-Chain Phase: Accumulation · Stablecoin Mcap: $313B
👉 Exchange reserves at 9-year low (~2.21M BTC). LTH supply at ~78.3% — one of the highest readings in BTC history. Whale accumulation: 270K BTC in past 30 days.
✅ First sustained push above $75K — bullish structure confirmed with 100-day EMA test.
🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATELocal: when new data | National: Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 13
📌 Hollister / San Benito Local (Apr 13):
Median: $750,000 · Active Listings: 79 · DOM: 83 · Months Supply: 1.52 · Unemployment: 5.6%
💡 Prices down 5-9% YoY; tight supply persists at 1.5 months; price cuts at 1.09% of listings
National (Feb 2026 — most recent):
Existing Sales: 4.26M · NAR Median: $398,400 · Case-Shiller YoY: 4.3% · 30Y Rate: 6.88%
NAHB HMI: 47 · CA Median: $652,000
⚠️ No new local data today — median $765K down 4.4% over 3 months per daily notes.
💼 JOBS & LABORMonthly (1st) | Claims: weekly when flagged · as of Feb 2026
NFP Headline: +151K (prior revision: -12K)
U-3: 4.1% · U-6: 7.9% · LFPR: 62.6%
Avg Hourly Earnings YoY: 3.9% · JOLTS: 7.6M · Quit Rate: 2.1%
Initial Claims (4-wk): 218K · Continuing: 1,890K
🏗️ Construction Payrolls: 6,488K · CA Construction: 866K · CA Unemployment: 5.3%
👉 Next NFP release: May 8, 2026. Construction payrolls stable at 6,488K.
🏗️ CONSTRUCTION & REMODELINGWeekly (Fridays) · as of Apr 10

Lumber (MBF)$525
Copper (/lb)$4.35
Steel HRC (/ton)$850
RMI: 64 · ABI: 49.4 · Backlog: 8.1 months · Permits: 1,376K
Construction Spending: $2,190B · Cost Environment: Inflating
💡 Lumber down to $525 from $596 last week — copper and steel also pulling back. Materials easing but still elevated.
📊 MACRO REGIME & SCORECARDWeekly (Mondays) · as of Apr 20
IndicatorValueSignal
Yield Curve (2s10s)+0.55%✅
Credit SpreadsTight✅
ISM PMI52.7✅
Fed Cuts Priced~1✅
DXY TrendDown✅
🔥 Regime: Risk-On — upgraded from Neutral. All five scorecard indicators now supportive.
Sectors: Leading: XLE, XLB, XLF / Lagging: XLC, XLV, XLK
💡 Credit spreads tightened ~30bps as VIX normalized from 31 to 18. DXY weakening to 98.3 on easing Strait tensions. ~50/50 odds of one 25bp cut by year-end.
💰 PORTFOLIO & EARNINGSMonthly (1st) · as of Mar 2026
S&P EPS Beat Rate: 71% · Blended EPS Growth: 13.8%
Portfolio: Rebalance · Cost Environment: Mixed
⚠️ Key Risk: Tariff escalation
Credit Stress Level: Moderate-High (Q1 2026 — CC delinquency 4.7%, mortgage delinquency 3.2%, saving rate 4.4%)

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Wednesday, April 22, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISKDaily · as of Apr 22
✅ Regime: Neutral — Fear & Greed at 67 (Greed)
S&P Futures: +0.17% · DXY: 98.35 (trend: Down) · 10Y: 4.28% · 2s10s: +0.48%
VIX: 19.89 · Put/Call: 0.56 · WTI Oil: $89.75 · Gold: $4,750
HY Spreads: Tight · Sectors: XLB leading / XLK lagging
🔥 BTC EOD: $75,658 (+3.0%) · Structure: Bullish
💡 Testing $75,272 (100-day EMA) and $75,680 horizontal resistance cluster — first sustained push above $75K
⚠️ Alerts: TSLA, IBRX, NEM
Macro Voice: Visser sees physical AI and industrial PMI names as 2026 thesis; Pompliano says BTC is the new king of safe haven assets
₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETSDaily | Weekly deep-dive Mondays · as of Apr 22
🔥 BTC: $77,340 (intraday) · EOD (Apr 20): $75,658 · 24h: +3.0% · Dominance: 57.0% · Structure: Bullish
Fear & Greed: 67 (Greed)
💡 Weekly (Apr 20): BTC/IGV Correlation: 0.70 · On-Chain Phase: Accumulation · Stablecoin Mcap: $313B
👉 Exchange reserves at 9-year low (~2.21M BTC). LTH supply at ~78.3% — highest in BTC history. Whale accumulation: 270K BTC in past 30 days (largest since 2013).
✅ BTC participating in risk-on but with dramatically lower beta than equities — QQQ surged 10.9% last week vs BTC +1.4%. Hybrid identity: part risk asset, part geopolitical hedge.
🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATELocal: when new data | National: Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 22
📌 Hollister / San Benito Local (Apr 22):
Median: $750,000 · DOM: 83 · Months Supply: 1.52
💡 Neutral market; prices down 5% YoY; homes selling at 99% of ask
National (Apr 2026 — most recent):
Existing Sales: 4.09M · New Sales: 587K · NAR Median: $398,000 · Case-Shiller YoY: 1.2%
30Y Rate: 6.38% · NAHB HMI: 38 · Starts: 1,487K · Permits: 1,376K · MBA Refi: 1,341
CA Median: $850,680 · Local Median: $748,584 · Local Listings: 154
⚠️ NAHB at 38 — builder confidence deeply depressed. 47% of local listings with price cuts.
💼 JOBS & LABORMonthly (1st) | Claims: weekly when flagged · as of Apr 1
⚠️ NFP: -92K (prior revision: -17K) — first negative NFP print this cycle
U-3: 4.4% · LFPR: 62.0% · Avg Hourly Earnings YoY: 1.4%
JOLTS Openings: 6.9M · Quit Rate: 1.9% · ADP: 62K
Initial Claims (4wk): 210K · Continuing: 1,819K
🏗️ Construction Payrolls: +30K · CA Unemployment: 5.1%
🔥 Negative NFP headline signals labor market contraction. Next release: May 8, 2026.
🏗️ CONSTRUCTION & REMODELINGWeekly (Fridays) · as of Apr 3

Lumber (MBF)$596
Copper (/lb)$6.06
Steel HRC (/ton)$975
RMI: 64 · ABI: 49.4 · Backlog: 8.1 months · Permits: 1,376K

ISM PMI52.7✅

💡 Credit spreads tightened ~30bps as VIX normalized from 31 to 18. DXY weakening to 98.3 on easing Strait tensions. ~50/50 odds of one 25bp cut by year-end.
🔥 Change flags: Credit Spreads widening→tightening, DXY up→down, Fed Path 0→~1 cut, Regime Neutral→Risk-On

S&P EPS Beat Rate: 75% · Blended EPS Growth: 13.0%
⚠️ Portfolio: IBRX crashed 26% on FDA Anktiva warning; XRPC down 41% on XRP collapse; APP and AVGO pulled back 15%+ from highs
🔥 Key Risk: TSMC capacity constraints threatening AI chip supply; IBRX regulatory/litigation risk unresolved; crypto altcoin exposure (XRPC) deteriorating

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Friday, April 24, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISK Daily · as of Apr 24, 2026
Regime: Neutral · S&P futures +0.4% · DXY 98.61 (↓ trending down) · 10Y Yield 4.30% · VIX 20.0
💡 Fear & Greed at 70 (Greed) — massive swing from Extreme Fear (21) five days ago.
Put/Call: 1.25 · WTI: $94.46 · Gold: $4,700 · HY Spreads: Tight
Sector Leader: XLE · Laggard: XLK
⚠️ Alert tickers: PLTR, AMD, NEM, IBRX
BTC EOD: $77,810 — Consolidating below $79,200 weekly resistance; $76,800 support held 4th session.
💡 Macro Voice: Visser sees physical AI as dominant 2026 theme; Pomp argues deflation (CPI <1%) is the real risk.
₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETS Daily | Weekly Mondays · as of Apr 24, 2026
BTC: $78,126 (spot) / $77,810 (EOD) · +2.7% 24h · Dominance 60.6% · Structure: Neutral
Fear & Greed: 70 (Greed) — massive swing from 21 (Extreme Fear) five days ago
💡 Weekly (Apr 20): BTC/IGV corr 0.70 — on-chain phase Accumulation. Whales absorbed 270K BTC in 30 days (largest since 2013). Exchange reserves at 9-year low.
Stablecoin Cap: $313B · Q1 volume $28T (+51% QoQ)
🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATE Local: when new | National: Monthly · as of Apr 1, 2026
Local (Hollister): Median $748,584 · 154 listings · 1.52 mo supply · 47% price cuts
CA: Median $850,680 · National 30Y: 6.38%
Sales: Existing 4.09M · New 587K · Starts 1,487K · Permits 1,376K
NAR Median: $398K · Case-Shiller +1.2% YoY · NAHB HMI 38
⚠️ Builder sentiment at 38 — deeply pessimistic despite improving macro.
💼 JOBS & LABOR Monthly · as of Apr 1, 2026
🔥 NFP: -92K — first negative print. Prior revised -17K.
U-3: 4.4% · LFPR: 62.0% · Earnings YoY: +1.4%
JOLTS: 6.9M · Claims: 210K (4-wk) / 1,819K continuing
Construction: +30K payrolls · CA: 5.1% unemployment
⚠️ Negative NFP + declining LFPR — watch May 8 release.
🏗️ CONSTRUCTION & REMODELING Weekly (Fridays) · as of Apr 24, 2026
Lumber$583.50/MBF
Copper$6.02/lb
Steel HRC$1,055/ton
Environment: Inflating · RMI: 62 · ABI: 49.8 · Backlog: 8.6 mo
Permits: 1,518K · Spending: $2,190.4B

Regime: Risk-On tilt · 2s10s +0.55% · Credit spreads tightening (~285 bps) · ISM 52.7 · ~1 cut priced · DXY falling

EPS Beat: 75% · Growth: +13.0%
